mechanics.excerpt: BATTLE ARMOR First designed and fielded by the Clans some centuries ago, powered armor still relatively new concept t0 tne Inner Sphere_ The suit can withstand damage from the heaviest of weapons_ While heavy and cumbersome the suit Is relatively flexible Tne pilot $ actions translated into myomer enhanced movements of the suit. hence the term power armor.
